recommendations.title: My Favourite Cake
recommendations.overview: Mahin lives alone in Tehran since her husband’s death and her daughter’s departure for Europe, until an afternoon tea with friends leads her to break her solitary routine and revitalize her love life.

recommendations.title: Private Lesson
recommendations.overview: Posing as a private tutor, Azra secretly coaches students on achieving their goals in life and love — but not without a few bumps in the road.

recommendations.title: Chhichhore
recommendations.overview: Following a group of friends from university as they progress into middle-age life and go their own separate ways.

recommendations.title: Jaane Tu... Ya Jaane Na
recommendations.overview: Two best friends being convinced that they are not in love search for each other's love.

recommendations.title: The Man Who Sleeps
recommendations.overview: A young student decides to have no more interaction with the world than is needed to minimally sustain life. His increasingly automaton-like behavior is coupled with a strange clarity of insight about the world around him.

recommendations.title: Another Gay Sequel: Gays Gone Wild!
recommendations.overview: Four university students head to Florida for spring break and enroll in a contest to see who can get the most sexual partners.

recommendations.title: Band Baaja Baaraat
recommendations.overview: Shruti and Bittoo decide to start a wedding planning company together after they graduate from university, but romance gets in the way of business.

recommendations.title: Through My Window: Across the Sea
recommendations.overview: After a year of long-distance, Raquel and Ares reunite on a steamy beach trip. Faced with fresh flirtations and insecurities, will their love prevail?

recommendations.title: So Young
recommendations.overview: Although new friendships and new love await her, a college freshman discovers that university life is not as simple as she had hoped.

recommendations.title: Write It on the Walls
recommendations.overview: Sole, a university student bored of her daily routine, meets graffiti artists Pierpaolo and Alex, and her life changes until she falls in love with one of them.
